critical.escalated.breached.headline: Immediate intervention required
critical.escalated.breached.assessment: This critical incident is escalated and has breached its SLA. Customer or operational impact may continue until ownership and mitigation are confirmed.
critical.escalated.breached.next_action: Confirm the active responder, document the current mitigation, and provide a time-bound stakeholder update.

critical.investigating.at_risk.headline: Critical incident approaching SLA
critical.investigating.at_risk.assessment: Investigation is active, but the remaining response window is limited. The incident needs a clear mitigation path before the SLA deadline.
critical.investigating.at_risk.next_action: Validate the working hypothesis, assign a mitigation owner, and prepare escalation if progress stalls.

high.investigating.breached.headline: Investigation is overdue
high.investigating.breached.assessment: This high-severity incident remains under investigation after its SLA deadline. Resolution risk is increasing without a documented recovery step.
high.investigating.breached.next_action: Record the latest finding, confirm the next diagnostic step, and escalate if no recovery path is available.

high.escalated.at_risk.headline: Escalated incident needs a decision
high.escalated.at_risk.assessment: The incident is escalated and nearing its SLA deadline. Cross-team attention is present, but a concrete mitigation decision is still needed.
high.escalated.at_risk.next_action: Name the decision owner and capture the mitigation or rollback choice before the SLA expires.

resolved.headline: Incident response completed
resolved.assessment: The incident is resolved. The remaining operational value is in validating recovery and preserving useful root-cause context.
resolved.next_action: Confirm service stability and complete the RCA note if follow-up learning is still missing.

default.headline: Incident requires operational follow-up
default.assessment: The incident is active and should continue through the normal response workflow with clear ownership and timely updates.
default.next_action: Confirm ownership, record the latest progress, and review the SLA deadline.

activity.none: No operational updates have been recorded yet.
activity.single: One activity has been recorded in the timeline.
activity.multiple: {{activity_count}} activities are available in the timeline.
